spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one or two creatures within range. A target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d6 at 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.description: You extend your hand and trace a sigil of warding in the air. Until the end of your next turn, you have resistance against bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from weapon attacks.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.description: You create a ghostly hand. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage and can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn. If you hit an undead target, it has disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn. Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.description: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover in the air for the duration. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form. Each light sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius. As a bonus action on your turn, you can move the lights up to 60 feet.

spells.name: Druidcraft
spells.description: Within 30 feet, you call on minor nature magic to forecast local weather for 24 hours with a harmless sign lasting 1 round, open a blossom or seed pod, create a harmless sensory effect in a 5-foot cube, or light or extinguish a candle, torch, or campfire.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack against one creature or object within 120 feet. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage. The spell creates more beams at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Elementalism
spells.description: Within 30 feet, you shape a minor elemental effect: stir air in a 5-foot cube, coat a 5-foot square with dust or write in loose earth, make harmless embers and smoke in a 5-foot cube, create mist or 1 cup of water, or form a crude 1-foot-cube shape for 1 hour.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried. Damage increases by 1d10 at 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the ability check.

spells.name: Light
spells.description: You touch one object that is no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like. Covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again or dismiss it as an action.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it as an action. You can use your action to control the hand, moving it up to 30 feet and using it to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item, or pour contents from a vial. The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

spells.name: Mending
spells.description: This spell repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link, two halves of a broken key, a torn cloak, or a leaking wineskin. The break or tear must be no larger than 1 foot in any dimension. The spell cannot restore magic to an item.

spells.name: Message
spells.description: You silently send a whispered message to a creature within 120 feet, and only it hears you and can whisper a reply only you hear before the spell ends after 1 round. Familiar solid barriers can be crossed, but magical silence, 1 foot of stone, metal, or wood, or thin lead blocks it.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.description: You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. If you create a sound, its volume can range from a whisper to a scream. If you create an image of an object, it must be no larger than a 5-foot cube. The image is purely visual; it isn't accompanied by sound, smell, or other sensory effects. Physical interaction reveals it to be an illusion.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.description: You extend your hand toward a creature you can see within range and project a puff of noxious gas. The creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d12 poison damage. Damage increases by 1d12 at 5th level (2d12), 11th level (3d12), and 17th level (4d12).

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: This spell is a minor magical trick that novice spellcasters use for practice. You create one of several minor effects: a harmless sensory effect, light or snuff out a small flame, clean or soil an object, chill or warm material, make a color or mark appear, or create a trinket or illusion that fits in your hand. You can have up to three non-instantaneous effects active at once.

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.description: A flame appears in your hand for 10 minutes, shedding bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light 20 feet farther without heat or ignition. As a Magic action, you can throw it at a creature or object within 60 feet, making a ranged spell attack for 1d8 fire damage on a hit. The damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, it takes 1d8 cold damage, and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

spells.name: Resistance
spells.description: Touch a willing creature and choose acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder. Once per turn before the 1-minute concentration ends, when it takes that damage type, it reduces the total by 1d4.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 radiant damage. The target gains no benefit from cover for this saving throw. Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.description: For 1 minute, a club or quarterstaff you hold can use your spellcasting ability for melee attack and damage rolls, and its damage die becomes 1d8. Damage can be force or the weapon's normal type, and the spell ends if you cast it again or release the weapon.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock to a creature you try to touch. Make a melee spell attack. You have advantage on the attack roll if the target is wearing armor made of metal. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 lightning damage, and it can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

spells.name: Sorcerous Burst
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack against one creature or object within 120 feet. On a hit, it takes 1d8 acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, psychic, or thunder damage; each 8 rolled lets you add another d8, up to your spellcasting ability modifier. The damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.description: Choose a creature within 15 feet that has 0 Hit Points and is not dead. It becomes Stable immediately.

spells.name: Starry Wisp
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack against one creature or object within 60 feet. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 radiant damage, sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius, and cannot benefit from the Invisible condition until the end of your next turn. The damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.description: You manifest a minor wonder within range. You create an effect such as: your voice booms, flames flicker or brighten, harmless tremors, an instantaneous sound, an unlocked door or window flies open, or you alter the appearance of your eyes. You can have up to three effects active at a time.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.description: As part of casting, you make one attack with the spell's weapon, using your spellcasting ability for the attack and damage rolls instead of Strength or Dexterity. If it deals damage, you choose radiant damage or the weapon's usual damage type.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.description: Hurl magically barbed insults at a creature you can see or hear within 60 feet. It makes a Wisdom save, taking 1d6 psychic damage on a failure and attacking with Disadvantage on its next attack roll before its next turn ends. The damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17.

spells.name: Alarm
spells.description: For 8 hours, you ward a door, window, or area no larger than a 20-foot cube within 30 feet and name creatures that do not trigger it. When another creature enters or touches the ward, you receive either a mental alert within 1 mile that can wake you or a 10-second audible bell heard within 60 feet.

spells.name: Animal Friendship
spells.description: Choose a Beast you can see within 30 feet. It makes a Wisdom saving throw; on a failure, it has the Charmed condition for 24 hours, ending early if you or your allies damage it.
spells.upcast: Affects one more Beast for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Armor of Agathys
spells.description: A protective magical force surrounds you, manifesting as spectral frost that covers you and your gear. You gain 5 temporary hit points for the duration. If a creature hits you with a melee attack while you have these hit points, the creature takes 5 cold damage.
spells.upcast: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, both the temporary hit points and the cold damage increase by 5 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Arms of Hadar
spells.description: You invoke the power of Hadar, the Dark Hunger. Tendrils of dark energy erupt from you and batter all creatures within 10 feet of you. Each creature in that area must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, a target takes 2d6 necrotic damage and can't take reactions until its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage, but suffers no other effect.
spells.upcast: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Bane
spells.description: Up to three creatures you can see within 30 feet make Charisma saving throws. For up to 1 minute with concentration, each failed target subtracts 1d4 whenever it makes an attack roll or saving throw.
spells.upcast: Affects one more creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the attack roll or saving throw. At higher levels, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.description: One Humanoid you can see within 30 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw, with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failure, it has the Charmed condition and is Friendly to you for 1 hour or until you or your allies damage it; afterward it knows you Charmed it.
spells.upcast: Targets one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Chromatic Orb
spells.description: Choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder, then make a ranged spell attack against a target within 90 feet. On a hit, it takes 3d8 damage of that type; if at least two d8s match, the orb jumps to a different target within 30 feet for a new attack and damage roll.

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.description: A dazzling burst of light fans out in a 15-foot cone. Each creature there must succeed on a Constitution save or be Blinded until your next turn ends.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: Speak a one-word order to a creature you can see within 60 feet. If it fails a Wisdom saving throw, it follows the command on its next turn: drop held items, flee by the fastest route, become Prone and end its turn, or halt without moving or taking actions or Bonus Actions.
spells.upcast: Affects one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.description: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language that you hear. You also understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It takes about 1 minute to read one page of text. This spell doesn't decode secret messages in a text or a glyph, such as an arcane sigil, that isn't part of a written language.

spells.name: Create or Destroy Water
spells.description: Within 30 feet, you either create up to 10 gallons of clean water in an open container or as rain in a 30-foot cube that extinguishes exposed flames, or you destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container or fog in a 30-foot cube.
spells.upcast: Add 10 gallons, or increase the cube by 5 feet, for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. Healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Detect Evil and Good
spells.description: For up to 10 minutes of concentration, you pinpoint any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet, and sense whether the Hallow spell is active nearby. A foot of stone, an inch of metal, or thin lead blocks this sense.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you. If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears magic, and you learn its school of magic, if any.

spells.name: Detect Poison and Disease
spells.description: For up to 10 minutes with concentration, you sense poisons, poisonous or venomous creatures, and magical contagions within 30 feet of you, including their kind. The spell is stopped by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood, 1 inch of metal, or thin lead.

spells.name: Disguise Self
spells.description: For 1 hour, you make yourself and worn or carried gear look different, including appearing 1 foot shorter or taller and heavier or lighter, while keeping the same basic limb arrangement. Physical contact exposes mismatches, and a creature can Study you and beat your spell save DC with Intelligence (Investigation) to see through it.

spells.name: Dissonant Whispers
spells.description: One creature you can see within 60 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 3d6 psychic damage and must use its Reaction, if it has one, to move as far from you as it safely can; on a success, it takes half damage only.

spells.name: Divine Favor
spells.description: For 1 minute, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage when they hit.

spells.name: Divine Smite
spells.description: After your attack hits, the target takes an extra 2d8 radiant damage from that attack. If the target is a Fiend or Undead, add 1d8 more radiant damage.

spells.name: Ensnaring Strike
spells.description: When you hit, vines force the target to make a Strength saving throw, with Advantage if it is Large or larger. On a failure, it has the Restrained condition for up to 1 minute with concentration and takes 1d6 piercing damage at the start of each of its turns; it or a creature in reach can use an action for a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC to end it.

spells.name: Entangle
spells.description: Plants fill a 20-foot square on the ground within 90 feet for up to 1 minute with concentration, making it Difficult Terrain. Each creature other than you in the area when you cast must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the Restrained condition until it uses an action to succeed on a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.description: You take the Dash action when you cast this spell. For up to 10 minutes with concentration, you can take Dash again as a Bonus Action.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.description: Objects in a 20-foot cube within 60 feet glow in a color you choose, and creatures in the cube that fail a Dexterity saving throw glow too. For up to 1 minute with concentration, affected targets shed dim light in a 10-foot radius, cannot benefit from the Invisible condition, and attack rolls against them have Advantage if the attacker can see them.

spells.name: False Life
spells.description: Necromantic energy bolsters you, giving you 2d4 + 4 Temporary Hit Points instantly. You gain 5 additional Temporary Hit Points for each slot level above 1st.
spells.upcast: Gain 5 more Temporary Hit Points for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.description: Choose up to five falling creatures within 60 feet. For 1 minute, each target descends at only 60 feet per round; when it lands before the spell ends, it takes no falling damage and the spell ends for that creature.

spells.name: Find Familiar
spells.description: A spirit appears in a chosen CR 0 Beast form within 10 feet as a Celestial, Fey, or Fiend familiar that obeys you and acts independently. Within 100 feet, you can communicate telepathically, borrow its senses as a Bonus Action, and have it deliver touch spells with its Reaction.

spells.name: Floating Disk
spells.description: You create a 3-foot-wide, 1-inch-thick horizontal force disk in an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet. For 1 hour it floats 3 feet above the ground, carries up to 500 pounds, stays put while you are within 20 feet, and follows to remain near you, ending if you are more than 100 feet away.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.description: Fog spreads from a point within 120 feet, filling a 20-foot-radius sphere that is Heavily Obscured for as long as you concentrate, up to 1 hour. A strong wind disperses it. The radius increases by 20 feet for each slot level above 1st.
spells.upcast: Increase the fog's radius by 20 feet for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.description: Ten magical berries appear in your hand for 24 hours. A creature can eat one as a Bonus Action to regain 1 Hit Point, and a single berry supplies enough nourishment for one day; any uneaten berries vanish when the spell ends.

spells.name: Grease
spells.description: Slick, nonflammable grease covers a 10-foot square centered on a point within 60 feet, making the ground Difficult Terrain for 1 minute. Creatures in the area when it appears, or that enter it or end a turn there, must pass a Dexterity save or fall Prone.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack against a creature within 120 feet. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll against it before the end of your next turn has Advantage.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.description: With a brief restoring word, one creature you can see within 60 feet regains Hit Points equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. The healing is instantaneous.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.description: You point your finger, and the creature that damaged you is momentarily surrounded by hellish flames. The creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. It takes 2d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
spells.upcast: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.description: Touch a willing creature and concentrate for up to 1 minute. For the duration it can't be Frightened, and at the start of each of its turns it gains Temporary Hit Points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier. You can affect one extra creature per slot level above 1st.
spells.upcast: Affect one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Hex
spells.description: You place a curse on a creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack. Also, choose one ability when you cast the spell. The target has disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability. If the target drops to 0 hit points before this spell ends, you can use a bonus action on a subsequent turn of yours to curse a new creature. A remove curse cast on the target ends this spell early.
spells.upcast: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd or 4th level, you can maintain your concentration on the spell for up to 8 hours. When you use a spell slot of 5th level or higher, you can maintain your concentration on the spell for up to 24 hours.

spells.name: Hideous Laughter
spells.description: One creature you can see within 30 feet must make a Wisdom save. On a failure, it is Prone and Incapacitated for up to 1 minute while you concentrate, cannot end Prone itself, and repeats the save at the end of each turn or when damaged, with Advantage on saves triggered by damage. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.
spells.upcast: Target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.description: Mark one creature you can see within 90 feet for up to 1 hour with Concentration. Your attack rolls against it deal an extra 1d6 force damage, you have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception or Survival) checks to find it, and if it drops to 0 Hit Points you can move the mark with a Bonus Action. Slots of 3rd-4th level extend Concentration to 8 hours, and 5th level or higher extends it to 24 hours.
spells.upcast: Concentration can last up to 8 hours with a 3rd- or 4th-level slot, or 24 hours with a 5th-level or higher slot.

spells.name: Ice Knife
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack with an ice shard against one creature within 60 feet. On a hit, it takes 1d10 piercing damage; hit or miss, the shard bursts, and the target plus each creature within 5 feet must pass a Dexterity save or take 2d6 cold damage.

spells.name: Identify
spells.description: You choose one object that you must touch throughout the casting of the spell. If it is a magic item or some other magic-imbued object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires attunement to use, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn which spell created it.

spells.name: Illusory Script
spells.description: You write on a suitable surface you touch, masking the text with an illusion for 10 days. You and chosen creatures read the intended message normally, while others see unreadable script or altered wording, handwriting, and language; Truesight reveals the hidden message, and dispelling removes both writings.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.description: A creature you touch must make a Constitution saving throw. It takes 2d10 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a success.

spells.name: Jump
spells.description: Touch a willing creature. For 1 minute, once on each of its turns, it can spend 10 feet of movement to jump up to 30 feet. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.
spells.upcast: Target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.description: Touch a creature to quicken its pace for 1 hour, increasing its Speed by 10 feet for the duration. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.
spells.upcast: Target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.description: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor, and a protective magical force surrounds it until the spell ends. The target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends if the target dons armor or if you dismiss the spell as an action.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: You create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range. A dart deals 1d4 + 1 force damage to its target. The darts all strike simultaneously. You create one additional dart for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.description: Touch a willing creature and concentrate for up to 10 minutes. Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attacks against it, cannot possess it or give it the Charmed or Frightened conditions, and the target has Advantage on new saves against such existing effects.

spells.name: Purify Food and Drink
spells.description: Choose a point within 10 feet. Nonmagical food and drink in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered there is instantly cleansed of poison and rot.

spells.name: Ray of Sickness
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack against a creature within 60 feet. On a hit it suffers 2d8 poison damage and is Poisoned until your next turn ends.

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.description: Ward a creature within 30 feet for 1 minute. A creature that targets it with an attack roll or damaging spell must succeed on a Wisdom save or choose another target or lose the attack or spell; area effects ignore the ward, and it ends if the warded creature attacks, casts a spell, or deals damage.

spells.name: Searing Smite
spells.description: When you hit a target, the attack deals an extra 1d6 fire damage. For up to 1 minute, the target takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of each of its turns, then makes a Constitution save; the spell ends on a success and continues on a failure.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from magic missile.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.description: Choose a creature within 60 feet and surround it with protective magic. While you concentrate for up to 10 minutes, the target gains a +2 bonus to AC.

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.description: Create a purely visual illusion no larger than a 15-foot Cube at a point within 60 feet for up to 10 minutes with Concentration. As a Magic action you can move it within range and adjust its appearance; physical contact exposes it, and a successful Intelligence (Investigation) Study check against your spell save DC lets a creature see through it.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8; the total is how many hit points of creatures this spell can affect. Creatures within 20 feet of a point you choose within range are affected in ascending order of their current hit points (ignoring unconscious creatures). Add 2d8 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Speak with Animals
spells.description: For 10 minutes, you understand and speak verbally with Beasts, and you can use any Influence action skill option with them. A Beast can usually report information it perceived within the past day, especially about nearby places and monsters.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube originating from you must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet away from you. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage and isn't pushed. Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Unseen Servant
spells.description: An Invisible, mindless, shapeless Medium force appears on the ground within 60 feet for 1 hour. It has AC 10, 1 Hit Point, Strength 2, cannot attack, and once on each of your turns you can command it as a Bonus Action to move up to 15 feet and handle simple objects; the spell ends if it moves more than 60 feet from you.

spells.name: Acid Arrow
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack with an acid arrow against a target within 90 feet. On a hit, it takes 4d4 acid damage now and 2d4 acid damage at the end of its next turn; on a miss, it takes half the initial damage only.

spells.name: Aid
spells.description: Choose up to three creatures within 30 feet. For 8 hours, each target's Hit Point maximum and current Hit Points increase by 5. The increase rises by 5 for each slot level above 2nd.
spells.upcast: Increase each target's Hit Points by 5 more for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Alter Self
spells.description: You reshape your body for up to 1 hour with Concentration, choosing aquatic adaptation, altered appearance, or natural weapons, and you can switch options with a Magic action. Aquatic adaptation lets you breathe underwater and gives a Swim Speed equal to your Speed; appearance changes keep your size and basic shape; natural weapons make your Unarmed Strike deal 1d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage using your spellcasting ability.

spells.name: Animal Messenger
spells.description: Choose a Tiny Beast you can see within 30 feet; if it is CR 0 and fails a Charisma save, it carries a message of up to twenty-five words toward a visited location and described recipient for 24 hours, traveling about 25 miles per day or 50 miles if it flies. If it arrives, it mimics your communication; if time runs out, the message is lost and it returns. The duration increases by 48 hours for each slot level above 2nd.
spells.upcast: Duration increases by 48 hours for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Arcane Lock
spells.description: You touch a shut door, window, gate, hatch, or container and seal it with magic until dispelled. Nonmagical methods cannot open it, but you and creatures you name can use it normally; a password spoken within 5 feet opens it for 1 minute.

spells.name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
spells.description: You touch a willing creature or unattended object and cloak how magic reads it for 24 hours. A creature can register as a different creature type, while an object can seem magical, nonmagical, or tied to a chosen school; daily casting for 30 days makes the illusion last until dispelled.

spells.name: Augury
spells.description: After 1 minute, you ask about a course of action planned for the next 30 minutes and receive an omen of good results, bad results, both, or neither. Later castings before a Long Rest have a cumulative 25 percent chance to give no answer.

spells.name: Barkskin
spells.description: You touch a willing creature, hardening its skin with barklike protection for 1 hour. While the spell lasts, the target's Armor Class is 17 if its normal AC would be lower.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.description: Choose one creature you can see within 120 feet. It makes a Constitution saving throw; on a failure, it gains either the Blinded or Deafened condition for 1 minute, repeating the save at the end of each turn to end the effect. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.
spells.upcast: Target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Blur
spells.description: Your form wavers for up to 1 minute while you concentrate. Attack rolls against you have Disadvantage, but a creature ignores this defense if it perceives you with Blindsight or Truesight.

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.description: Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius sphere within 60 feet makes a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, you either suppress Charmed and Frightened and grant immunity to them, or make the target indifferent toward chosen hostile creatures until harmed or it sees allies harmed.

spells.name: Continual Flame
spells.description: You touch an object and create a heatless flame that lasts until dispelled. It gives Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for 20 feet more, consumes no fuel, and can be covered but not put out by smothering or dousing.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.description: A willing creature you touch gains Darkvision out to 150 feet for 8 hours.

spells.name: Detect Thoughts
spells.description: For up to 1 minute while concentrating, you sense thinking creatures within 30 feet or read the surface thoughts of one such creature you can see or detected. Deeper probing requires a Wisdom saving throw; failure reveals reasoning, emotions, and a prominent concern, while success ends the spell.

spells.name: Dragon's Breath
spells.description: You touch a willing creature and choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison. For up to 1 minute while you concentrate, the target can use a Magic action to exhale a 15-foot cone; creatures there make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 damage of the chosen type on a failure or half on a success.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.description: You touch a creature and choose Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. For up to 1 hour while you concentrate, the target has Advantage on ability checks using that ability. You can affect one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd, choosing abilities separately.
spells.upcast: Affects one additional creature per slot level above 2nd; each target can use a different ability.

spells.name: Enlarge/Reduce
spells.description: Choose a creature or unattended object you can see within 30 feet for up to 1 minute while concentrating; an unwilling creature negates the spell with a Constitution save. Enlarge raises size one category, grants Advantage on Strength checks and saves, and adds 1d4 to weapon or Unarmed Strike damage; Reduce does the reverse and subtracts 1d4, to a minimum of 1 damage.

spells.name: Enthrall
spells.description: Creatures you choose and can see within 60 feet make a Wisdom saving throw, though those fighting you or your allies succeed automatically. On a failure, a target takes a -10 penalty to Wisdom (Perception) checks and Passive Perception for up to 1 minute while you concentrate.

spells.name: Find Steed
spells.description: You summon a loyal Otherworldly Steed in an unoccupied space within 30 feet, choosing Celestial, Fey, or Fiend for its type. It appears as a Large rideable animal, acts as your ally and controlled mount, and vanishes at 0 Hit Points or when you die; recasting replaces or recalls it. The stat block uses the slot level.
spells.upcast: Use the slot's level as the spell level for the steed's stat block.

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.description: You sense traps within 120 feet that are in your line of sight. The spell reveals that such a designed hazard exists and the general kind of danger it poses, but not its exact location or natural instabilities.

spells.name: Flame Blade
spells.description: You form a fiery scimitar-shaped blade in your free hand for up to 10 minutes while concentrating, and can recreate it as a Bonus Action if released. As a Magic action, make a melee spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 3d6 fire damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier. The blade sheds Bright Light for 10 feet and Dim Light for 10 feet more.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.description: You create a 5-foot-diameter fiery sphere on the ground within 60 feet for up to 1 minute while concentrating. A creature that ends its turn within 5 feet, or whose space the sphere enters when you move it up to 30 feet as a Bonus Action, makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 fire damage on a failure or half on a success.

spells.name: Gentle Repose
spells.description: You touch a corpse or remains, preserving the target for 10 days. During that time it does not decay, cannot become Undead, and the days do not count against the time limit of magic that could return it to life.

spells.name: Gust of Wind
spells.description: A 60-foot-long, 10-foot-wide line of wind blasts from you for up to 1 minute while you concentrate. Creatures in the line make a Strength saving throw or are pushed 15 feet away along it, repeat the save when ending a turn there, and spend 2 feet of movement per foot moved toward you; you can redirect the line as a Bonus Action.

spells.name: Heat Metal
spells.description: Choose a manufactured metal object you can see within 60 feet and heat it for up to 1 minute while concentrating. A creature touching it takes 2d8 fire damage when you cast the spell and when you repeat the damage as a Bonus Action; if holding or wearing it, the creature must make a Constitution save or drop it, or else have Disadvantage on attacks and ability checks until your next turn.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.description: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make another Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the spell ends on the target. You can target one additional humanoid for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person. The spell ends for a target that attacks or casts a spell. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Knock
spells.description: One mundane lock, stuck object, or barred closure within 60 feet opens, or one Arcane Lock on it is suppressed for 10 minutes. A sharp knock rings from the target and is audible out to 300 feet.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.description: You touch a creature and immediately end one condition on it: Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, or Poisoned.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.description: One creature or loose object you can see within 60 feet rises up to 20 feet and hangs there for up to 10 minutes while you concentrate; an unwilling creature avoids the effect with a Constitution save. The target moves only by pushing or pulling against fixed surfaces, while you can change its altitude by up to 20 feet on your turn; unattended objects can weigh up to 500 pounds.

spells.name: Locate Animals or Plants
spells.description: Name or describe a kind of Beast, Plant creature, or nonmagical plant. If one lies within 5 miles, you sense the direction and distance to the nearest such creature or plant.

spells.name: Locate Object
spells.description: For up to 10 minutes while concentrating, you sense the direction to a familiar object within 1,000 feet, and its direction of travel if it moves. You can seek a specific object you have viewed within 30 feet or the nearest object of a kind, but any lead between you and it blocks the spell.

spells.name: Magic Mouth
spells.description: You place a message of up to 25 words into an unattended object within 30 feet, set to speak in your voice when a visual or audible trigger occurs within 30 feet of it. The message can take up to 10 minutes to deliver, and the spell can end after speaking or repeat until dispelled.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.description: You touch a nonmagical weapon, making it magical for 1 hour with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. The spell ends early if you cast it again. The bonus becomes +2 with a 3rd- to 5th-level slot and +3 with a 6th-level or higher slot.
spells.upcast: The bonus is +2 with a 3rd-5th-level slot and +3 with a 6th-level or higher slot.

spells.name: Mind Spike
spells.description: One creature you can see within 120 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 psychic damage on a failure or half on a success. On a failed save, you know its location for up to 1 hour while concentrating and while on the same plane, and it gains no benefit from being hidden or Invisible against you.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear in your space. Until the spell ends, the duplicates move with you and mimic your actions, shifting position so it's impossible to track which image is real. You can use your action to dismiss the illusory duplicates. Each time a creature targets you with an attack during the spell's duration, roll a d20 to determine whether the attack instead targets one of your duplicates. If you have three duplicates, you must roll a 6 or higher to change the attack's target to a duplicate. With two duplicates, you must roll an 8 or higher. With one duplicate, you must roll an 11 or higher. A duplicate's AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier. If an attack hits a duplicate, the duplicate is destroyed. A duplicate can be destroyed only by an attack that hits it. It ignores all other damage and effects. The spell ends when all three duplicates are destroyed. A creature is unaffected by this spell if it can't see, if it relies on senses other than sight, such as blindsight, or if it can perceive illusions as false, as with truesight.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

spells.name: Moonbeam
spells.description: A 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder of pale light appears within 120 feet for up to 1 minute while you concentrate. A creature makes a Constitution saving throw when the beam appears on it, moves into its space, it enters the area, or it ends its turn there, taking 2d10 radiant damage on a failure or half on a success; a shape-shifted creature that fails reverts and cannot shape-shift until it leaves.

spells.name: Pass without Trace
spells.description: You project a 30-foot Emanation for up to 1 hour while concentrating. You and creatures you choose in the aura gain a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and leave no tracks for others to follow.

spells.name: Phantasmal Force
spells.description: One creature you can see within 60 feet makes an Intelligence saving throw. On a failure, you plant a perceived object, creature, or phenomenon no larger than a 10-foot Cube for up to 1 minute; it can deal 2d8 psychic damage on each of your turns while the target is in or within 5 feet of it.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.description: After a 1-minute casting, up to five creatures that stayed within 30 feet for the whole casting gain the benefits of a Short Rest and regain 2d8 hit points. A creature cannot benefit from this spell again until it finishes a Long Rest.

spells.name: Protection from Poison
spells.description: You touch a creature, ending the Poisoned condition on it. For 1 hour, the target has Advantage on saving throws to prevent or end the Poisoned condition and resistance to poison damage.

spells.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
spells.description: A creature within 60 feet makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Tests and subtracts 1d8 from all damage rolls for up to 1 minute, repeating the save at the end of each turn; on a success, only its next attack roll has Disadvantage until your next turn starts.

spells.name: Rope Trick
spells.description: You touch a rope, causing one end to rise and open an Invisible 3-by-5-foot portal to an extradimensional space for 1 hour. Up to eight Medium or smaller creatures can fit inside; effects cannot cross the portal, creatures inside can see out, and anything inside falls out when the spell ends.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. You can hurl them at one target or several. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage. You create one additional ray for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: See Invisibility
spells.description: For 1 hour, you see creatures and objects with the Invisible condition as though they lacked it. You also see into the Ethereal Plane, where its occupants appear ghostlike.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: A harsh burst sounds from a point within 60 feet. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius Sphere makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 3d8 thunder damage on a failure or half as much on a success; Constructs have Disadvantage, and unattended nonmagical objects in the area also take the damage.

spells.name: Shining Smite
spells.description: The struck target takes an extra 2d6 radiant damage. While you concentrate, up to 1 minute, it glows with Bright Light in a 5-foot radius, gains no benefit from being Invisible, and grants Advantage to attack rolls made against it.

spells.name: Silence
spells.description: Choose a point within 120 feet; for up to 10 minutes while you concentrate, a 20-foot-radius Sphere there blocks sound. Sound cannot originate in or pass through it, creatures wholly inside are Deafened, objects and creatures wholly inside are immune to thunder damage, and Verbal spells cannot be cast there.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.description: A willing creature you touch can move along walls and ceilings with its hands free for up to 1 hour while you concentrate. The target also gains a Climb Speed equal to its Speed.
spells.upcast: Targets one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Spike Growth
spells.description: Ground in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within 150 feet becomes camouflaged Difficult Terrain for up to 10 minutes while you concentrate. A creature that moves into or through the area takes 2d4 piercing damage for every 5 feet traveled, and one that did not see the casting must Search successfully to spot the hazard.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.description: You create a spectral weapon-like force in a space within 60 feet for up to 1 minute while concentrating and immediately make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier force damage; as a Bonus Action later, you can move the force up to 20 feet and attack again.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.description: One creature you can see within 30 feet that can hear and understand you must make a Wisdom saving throw against a reasonable instruction of 25 words or fewer. On a failure, it is Charmed for up to 8 hours while you concentrate and follows the suggestion until completed or until you or your allies damage it.

spells.name: Warding Bond
spells.description: You touch a willing creature, linking it to you for 1 hour. While it stays within 60 feet, it gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws and resistance to all damage, but whenever it takes damage, you take the same amount; the spell ends if you drop to 0 hit points, the distance exceeds 60 feet, or either creature is affected by this spell again.

spells.name: Web
spells.description: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice within range. The webs fill a 20-foot cube from that point for the duration. The webs are difficult terrain and lightly obscure their area. If the webs aren't anchored between two solid masses (such as walls or trees) or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling, the conjured web collapses on itself, and the spell ends at the start of your next turn. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 feet. Each creature that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is restrained as long as it remains in the webs or until it breaks free. A creature restrained by the webs can use its action to make a Strength check against your spell save DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer restrained. The webs are flammable. Any 5-foot cube of webs exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing 2d4 fire damage to any creature that starts its turn in the fire.

spells.name: Zone of Truth
spells.description: You create a 15-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within 60 feet for 10 minutes. A creature that enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts there makes a Charisma saving throw; on a failure, it cannot deliberately lie in the area, and you know whether each save succeeds or fails.

spells.name: Animate Dead
spells.description: Choose a Medium or Small Humanoid corpse or bone pile within 10 feet, turning it into a Zombie or Skeleton under your control for 24 hours. As a Bonus Action, you can command undead you made within 60 feet; recasting before control ends reasserts command over up to four such creatures.
spells.upcast: Animate or maintain control over two additional Undead per slot level above 3rd, each from a separate corpse or bone pile.

spells.name: Beacon of Hope
spells.description: Choose any number of creatures within 30 feet. For up to 1 minute while you concentrate, each target has Advantage on Wisdom saving throws and Death Saving Throws, and any healing it receives restores the maximum possible hit points.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.description: A creature you touch makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is cursed for up to 1 minute while you concentrate; choose Disadvantage with one ability's checks and saves, Disadvantage on attacks against you, a Wisdom save each turn or Dodge, or an extra 1d8 necrotic damage when you hit it with an attack or spell.
spells.upcast: A 4th-level slot extends concentration to 10 minutes; 5th-6th removes concentration and lasts 8 hours; 7th-8th lasts 24 hours; 9th lasts until dispelled.

spells.name: Blink
spells.description: For 1 minute, roll 1d6 at the end of each of your turns. On a 4-6, you vanish to the Ethereal Plane until your next turn starts, then return to an unoccupied space you can see within 10 feet of where you left, or the nearest unoccupied space if none is available.

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.description: A 10-foot-tall, 60-foot-radius storm cloud appears above a point you can see within 120 feet for up to 10 minutes while you concentrate. When you cast and as a Magic action later, choose a point under it; creatures within 5 feet make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d10 lightning damage on a failure or half on a success, plus 1d10 damage if cast outdoors in a storm.

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.description: You create an Invisible, intangible sensor within 1 mile in a familiar place or an obvious unfamiliar place for up to 10 minutes while concentrating. Choose sight or hearing through the sensor when you cast, and you can switch senses as a Bonus Action.

spells.name: Conjure Animals
spells.description: Spectral animal spirits form a Large intangible pack in an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet for up to 10 minutes while you concentrate. You have Advantage on Strength saves within 5 feet of it, can move it up to 30 feet when you move, and can force a creature within 10 feet of it once per turn to make a Strength saving throw or take 3d10 slashing damage.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect. If it is casting a spell of 4th level or higher, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the creature's spell fails. When cast with a 4th-level slot or higher, the interrupted spell has no effect if its level is less than or equal to the level of the spell slot you used.

spells.name: Create Food and Water
spells.description: You create 45 pounds of nourishing food and 30 gallons of clean water on the ground or in containers within 30 feet. The food can look like a food you choose and spoils after 24 hours if not eaten.

spells.name: Daylight
spells.description: Sunlight fills a 60-foot-radius Sphere from a point within 60 feet for 1 hour, creating Bright Light and another 60 feet of Dim Light. You can instead place it on an unattended object as a 60-foot Emanation that can be covered, and it dispels overlapping magical Darkness of level 3 or lower.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within 120 feet. Any spell of level 3 or lower on it ends, and for each spell of level 4 or higher you make a spellcasting ability check against DC 10 + that spell's level, ending that spell on a success.
spells.upcast: Automatically ends spells on the target whose level is no higher than the slot used.

spells.name: Fear
spells.description: Each creature in a 30-foot Cone must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it drops what it holds and is Frightened for up to 1 minute while you concentrate; while Frightened, it Dashes away by the safest route each turn if possible, and it repeats the save at the end of a turn when it cannot see you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range then blossoms with a roar into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A target takes 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 3rd.

spells.name: Gaseous Form
spells.description: A willing creature you touch and its gear become a misty cloud for up to 1 hour while you concentrate. It has a 10-foot Fly Speed and hover, can share spaces and pass through small openings, treats liquids as solid, resists bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage, is immune to Prone, has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, and cannot talk, attack, cast spells, or handle objects.
spells.upcast: Targets one additional creature for each slot level above 3rd.

spells.name: Glyph of Warding
spells.description: Over 1 hour, you mark a surface or closable object you touch with a hidden glyph no larger than 10 feet across that lasts until dispelled or triggered. It breaks if moved over 10 feet; when triggered, it either explodes in a 20-foot-radius Sphere for 5d8 acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage with a Dexterity save for half, or releases a stored spell of level 3 or lower.
spells.upcast: Explosive runes gain 1d8 damage per slot level above 3rd; spell glyphs can store a spell up to the slot level used.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Choose a willing creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, the target's speed is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. That action can be used only for Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object. When the spell ends, the target can't move or take actions until after its next turn.

spells.name: Hunger of Hadar
spells.description: You open a gateway to the dark between the stars, a region infested with unknown horrors. A 20-foot-radius sphere of blackness and bitter cold appears, centered on a point within range and lasting for the duration. This void is filled with a cacophony of soft whispers and slurping noises that can be heard up to 30 feet away. No light, magical or otherwise, can illuminate the area, and creatures fully within it are blinded. The void creates a warp in the fabric of space, and the area is difficult terrain. Any creature that starts its turn in the area takes 2d6 cold damage. Any creature that ends its turn in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 acid damage as milky, otherworldly tentacles rub against it.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.description: A twisting pattern flashes in a 30-foot Cube within 120 feet, then disappears. Each creature in the area that sees it makes a Wisdom saving throw; on a failure, it is Charmed for up to 1 minute while you concentrate, and while Charmed it is Incapacitated with Speed 0 until it takes damage or another creature uses an action to shake it awake.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A stroke of lightning forming a line 100 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 8d6 lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

spells.name: Magic Circle
spells.description: You form a 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-high cylinder of warding energy on ground within 10 feet and choose Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, Undead, or several of them. Chosen creatures struggle to cross the boundary, make a Charisma save before teleporting or planar traveling through it, have disadvantage against creatures on the protected side, and cannot charm, frighten, or possess them; you may reverse the ward. Duration increases by 1 hour for each slot level above 3rd.
spells.upcast: Duration increases by 1 hour for each slot level above 3rd.

spells.name: Major Image
spells.description: You create a convincing visible illusion within 120 feet, no larger than a 20-foot cube, with appropriate sounds, smells, and temperature but no damage or conditions. While in range, you can use a Magic action to move and alter it; physical contact or a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check reveals it. A 4th-level or higher slot makes it last until dispelled without Concentration.
spells.upcast: A 4th-level or higher slot makes the illusion permanent until dispelled and removes Concentration.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.description: You speak a quick restorative word to as many as six creatures you can see within 60 feet. Each target immediately regains hit points equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

spells.name: Meld into Stone
spells.description: You touch a stone object or surface large enough to hold you and merge yourself and your gear into it for 8 hours. You are hidden from nonmagical senses, can hear only with hindered Perception, may cast spells on yourself, and can exit with 5 feet of movement. Damage or reshaping that can no longer contain you expels you, dealing 6d6 force damage; destruction or transmutation deals 50 force damage and leaves you Prone.

spells.name: Nondetection
spells.description: You touch a willing creature, an object, or a place no more than 10 feet in any dimension and mask it for 8 hours. The target cannot be chosen as the target of Divination spells or observed through magical scrying sensors.

spells.name: Phantom Steed
spells.description: A Large quasi-real mount appears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 30 feet, with saddle, bit, and bridle. You choose its look; it uses the Riding Horse stat block but has Speed 100 feet and can cover 13 miles in an hour. It lasts 1 hour, fades over 1 minute when the spell ends, and vanishes early if it takes damage.

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.description: With a 1-hour casting, you enrich plants in a half-mile radius around a point within 150 feet for 365 days, doubling their harvest and preventing another benefit that year. With the overgrowth effect, normal plants in a 100-foot-radius sphere become dense terrain where 1 foot of movement costs 4 feet, and you may exclude areas of any size.

spells.name: Protection from Energy
spells.description: You touch a willing creature and protect it for up to 1 hour while you maintain Concentration. Choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder; the target has Resistance to that damage type for the duration.

spells.name: Remove Curse
spells.description: You touch one creature or object and end every curse currently affecting it. If the target is a cursed magic item, the curse remains on the item, but its owner's attunement to it is broken so the item can be removed or discarded.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.description: You touch a creature that died within the last minute and return it to life with 1 hit point. The spell cannot restore a creature that died from old age, and it does not replace or repair missing body parts.

spells.name: Sending
spells.description: You deliver a message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you have met or one described by someone who has met it, at any distance. The target understands the meaning, knows you sent it if it knows you, and may answer at once; across planes, the message has a 5 percent chance to fail, which you learn. A recipient can block further sendings from you for 8 hours.

spells.name: Sleet Storm
spells.description: Freezing rain fills a 40-foot-high, 20-foot-radius cylinder centered on a point within 150 feet for up to 1 minute. The area is Heavily Obscured, exposed flames go out, and the ground is Difficult Terrain. A creature that enters it for the first time on a turn or starts there must make a Dexterity save or fall Prone and lose Concentration.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Choose up to six creatures in a 40-foot cube within 120 feet. Each target that fails a Wisdom saving throw is slowed for up to 1 minute: Speed halved, -2 to AC and Dexterity saves, no Reactions, either an action or Bonus Action on its turn, only one attack with the Attack action, and a 25 percent failure chance for spells with Somatic components. It repeats the save at the end of each turn.

spells.name: Speak with Dead
spells.description: You animate a corpse within 10 feet enough to answer up to five questions over 10 minutes, provided it has a mouth, was not Undead when it died, and has not been targeted by this spell in the last 10 days. It knows only what it knew in life, cannot learn or predict, and may answer briefly, cryptically, repeatedly, or falsely if hostile.

spells.name: Speak with Plants
spells.description: For 10 minutes, plants in a stationary 30-foot Emanation around you gain limited awareness, can communicate with you, and can follow simple commands without uprooting themselves. You can ask about events there from the past day, speak with Plant creatures as if sharing a language, or change plant-based Difficult Terrain in the area to normal terrain or normal plant terrain to Difficult Terrain.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.description: Spirits surround you in a 15-foot Emanation for up to 10 minutes, and you choose creatures they ignore when you cast the spell. Other creatures have halved Speed there and, once per turn when the Emanation enters their space or they enter or end there, make a Wisdom save, taking 3d8 radiant or necrotic damage on a failure or half on a success.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of foul gas centered within 90 feet for up to 1 minute. The cloud is Heavily Obscured and lasts until the spell ends or strong wind disperses it. A creature that starts its turn inside must succeed on a Constitution save or be Poisoned until that turn ends; while Poisoned this way, it cannot take an action or Bonus Action.

spells.name: Tiny Hut
spells.description: A stationary 10-foot Emanation surrounds you for 8 hours, failing if it cannot contain all creatures in its area. Creatures and objects inside at casting can pass through; others cannot, and spells of level 3 or lower cannot pass through or extend inside. The interior stays dry and comfortable, can be Dim Light or Darkness, is opaque outside and clear inside, and ends if you leave or recast it.

spells.name: Tongues
spells.description: You touch a creature and grant it linguistic understanding for 1 hour. The target understands any spoken or signed language it hears or sees, and when it speaks or signs, any creature that knows at least one language can understand it if able to perceive the communication.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.description: For up to 1 minute, your touch can drain life. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within reach; on a hit, it takes 3d6 necrotic damage, and you regain hit points equal to half the necrotic damage dealt. On later turns before the spell ends, you can repeat the attack as a Magic action against the same or a different creature.

spells.name: Water Breathing
spells.description: Choose up to ten willing creatures within 30 feet. For 24 hours, each target can breathe underwater and also keeps whatever normal breathing method it already has.

spells.name: Water Walk
spells.description: Up to ten willing creatures within 30 feet can move across liquid surfaces such as water, acid, mud, snow, quicksand, or lava as if on solid ground for 1 hour, though harmful liquids can still harm them. A target can use a Bonus Action to move between the surface and the liquid below; if it falls into the liquid, it passes through the surface.

spells.name: Wind Wall
spells.description: A wall of wind rises from the ground within 120 feet, up to 50 feet long, 15 feet high, and 1 foot thick, shaped as one continuous path for up to 1 minute. Creatures in its area when it appears make a Strength save, taking 4d8 bludgeoning damage on a failure or half on a success. It blocks gases, Small or smaller flying creatures and objects, light loose materials, ordinary projectiles, and gaseous creatures, but not giant-thrown boulders or siege shots.

spells.name: Arcane Eye
spells.description: You create an Invisible, invulnerable floating eye within 30 feet for up to 1 hour while you maintain Concentration. You receive its sight in all directions, including Darkvision to 30 feet, and can move it up to 30 feet as a Bonus Action. Solid barriers stop it, but it can pass through openings at least 1 inch wide.

spells.name: Aura of Life
spells.description: A 30-foot Emanation surrounds you for up to 10 minutes while you maintain Concentration. You and allies in the aura have Resistance to necrotic damage, your hit point maximums cannot be reduced, and any ally with 0 hit points that starts its turn there regains 1 hit point.

spells.name: Banishment
spells.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another plane of existence. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished. If the target is native to the plane you're on, it is banished to a harmless demiplane. If the target is native to a different plane, it is banished home. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 4th.

spells.name: Black Tentacles
spells.description: Writhing tentacles fill a 20-foot square on ground you can see within 90 feet for up to 1 minute, making the area Difficult Terrain. A creature there when the spell appears, or that enters or ends its turn there, makes a Strength save once per turn; on a failure, it takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage and is Restrained until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can use an action to escape with a successful Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC.

spells.name: Blight
spells.description: Choose a creature you can see within 30 feet. It makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 necrotic damage on a failure or half as much on a success; Plant creatures fail automatically. Instead, you can target a nonmagical plant that is not a creature, which withers and dies without a save.

spells.name: Charm Monster
spells.description: Choose one creature you can see within 30 feet. It makes a Wisdom saving throw, with advantage if you or your allies are fighting it; on a failure, it is Charmed by you and Friendly to you for 1 hour or until you or your allies damage it. When the effect ends, the target knows you Charmed it. You can affect one additional creature for each slot level above 4th.
spells.upcast: Targets one additional creature for each slot level above 4th.

spells.name: Compulsion
spells.description: Each creature you choose that you can see within 30 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Charmed for up to 1 minute. As a Bonus Action during the spell, you choose a horizontal direction relative to you; on its next turn, each Charmed target uses as much movement as possible to move that way by the safest route, then repeats the save to end the spell on itself.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.description: Creatures in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered within 90 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become disoriented for up to 1 minute. An affected target cannot take Bonus Actions or Reactions, rolls 1d10 at the start of each turn to determine whether it wanders, does nothing, attacks randomly in melee, or acts normally, and repeats the save at each turn's end. The sphere radius increases by 5 feet for each slot level above 4th.
spells.upcast: Sphere radius increases by 5 feet for each slot level above 4th.

spells.name: Conjure Minor Elementals
spells.description: Elemental spirits circle you in a 15-foot Emanation for up to 10 minutes. Your attacks deal an extra 2d8 acid, cold, fire, or lightning damage, chosen on each hit, to creatures in the Emanation, and the area is Difficult Terrain for your enemies.

spells.name: Conjure Woodland Beings
spells.description: Nature spirits swirl around you in a 10-foot Emanation for up to 10 minutes. A creature you can see saves with Wisdom when the Emanation enters its space, it enters, or it ends its turn there, taking 5d8 force damage on a failure or half on a success, once per turn. You can Disengage as a Bonus Action.

spells.name: Control Water
spells.description: You command water in a cube up to 100 feet on a side within 300 feet for up to 10 minutes. Each Magic action can flood the area, part it, redirect flow, or create a whirlpool; the whirlpool pulls nearby creatures and forces a Strength save for 2d8 bludgeoning damage, or half on a success.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.description: You touch a creature and ward it for 8 hours. The first time it would fall to 0 Hit Points, it falls to 1 instead and the spell ends; if an effect would kill it outright without damage, that effect is negated and the spell ends.

spells.name: Dimension Door
spells.description: You teleport yourself to a location within 500 feet that you can see, picture, or specify by distance and direction. One willing creature within 5 feet can travel with you to a space within 5 feet of your destination. If arrival is blocked, each traveler takes 4d6 force damage and the teleport fails.

spells.name: Divination
spells.description: You ask a deity or divine servants one question about a specific goal, event, or activity within the next 7 days and receive a truthful, possibly brief or symbolic answer. Each additional casting before a Long Rest has a cumulative 25 percent chance to yield no answer.

spells.name: Dominate Beast
spells.description: One Beast you can see within 60 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw, with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failure, it is Charmed for up to 1 minute, linked to you telepathically on the same plane, and obeys your commands; damage lets it repeat the save to end the spell.
spells.upcast: Concentration lasts up to 10 minutes with a 5th-level slot, 1 hour with a 6th-level slot, or 8 hours with a 7th-level or higher slot.

spells.name: Fabricate
spells.description: You turn visible raw materials within 120 feet into objects made of the same substance. The result can be Large or smaller within a 10-foot Cube or eight connected 5-foot Cubes, or Medium within a 5-foot Cube for metal, stone, or minerals; creatures and magic items cannot be made.

spells.name: Faithful Hound
spells.description: You create an unseen, intangible watchdog in an unoccupied space within 30 feet for 8 hours or until you are more than 300 feet from it. It barks at Small or larger intruders within 30 feet that lack the password, has 30-foot Truesight, and bites one enemy within 5 feet each turn for 4d8 force damage on a failed Dexterity save.

spells.name: Fire Shield
spells.description: Flames wreathe you for 10 minutes, shedding Bright Light in 10 feet and Dim Light 10 feet farther. Choose a warm shield for cold resistance or a chill shield for fire resistance; a creature within 5 feet that hits you with a melee attack takes 2d8 fire or cold damage from the matching shield.

spells.name: Freedom of Movement
spells.description: You touch a willing creature for 1 hour. Difficult Terrain does not hinder it, magical effects cannot reduce its Speed or give it the Paralyzed or Restrained conditions, it gains a Swim Speed equal to its Speed, and it can spend 5 feet of movement to escape nonmagical restraints or a Grapple.
spells.upcast: Targets one additional creature for each slot level above 4th.

spells.name: Giant Insect
spells.description: You summon a giant centipede, spider, or wasp in an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet for up to 10 minutes. It uses the Giant Insect stat block, acts after you on your Initiative, obeys your verbal commands without an action, and Dodges while avoiding danger if not commanded.
spells.upcast: The stat block uses the slot's level as the spell level.

spells.name: Greater Invisibility
spells.description: You touch a creature, and it has the Invisible condition for up to 1 minute while you maintain Concentration. The effect does not end early because the target attacks, casts a spell, or otherwise takes actions.

spells.name: Guardian of Faith
spells.description: A Large invulnerable spectral guardian appears in an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet for 8 hours. An enemy that first moves within 10 feet of it on a turn or starts there makes a Dexterity save, taking 20 radiant damage on a failure or half on a success; the guardian vanishes after dealing 60 total damage.

spells.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
spells.description: You disguise natural terrain in a 150-foot Cube within 300 feet for 24 hours, changing its apparent sights, sounds, and smells into another kind of natural terrain. Touch reveals unchanged substance, and a creature can Study it with Intelligence (Investigation) against your spell save DC to see the illusion over the real terrain.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.description: Hail crashes down in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered within 300 feet. Each creature there makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d10 bludgeoning damage and 4d6 cold damage on a failure or half on a success, and the ground becomes Difficult Terrain until the end of your next turn.

spells.name: Locate Creature
spells.description: For up to 1 hour, you sense the direction to a familiar named or described creature within 1,000 feet, including its direction of travel. You can instead seek the nearest creature of a kind you have seen within 30 feet; the spell fails through lead, across different forms, or beyond range.

spells.name: Phantasmal Killer
spells.description: One creature you can see within 120 feet faces an illusion only it perceives and makes a Wisdom saving throw. It takes 4d10 psychic damage on a failure, or half on a success as the spell ends; on a failure, it also has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls, then repeats the save at each turn's end, taking the damage again on failures.

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.description: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw. The target's game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast. The target's hit points become those of the new form. When it reverts to its normal form, the creature returns to the number of hit points it had before it transformed.

spells.name: Private Sanctum
spells.description: You ward a cube within 120 feet, from 5 feet to 100 feet on each side, for 24 hours. Choose protections that block sound, sight through the boundary, Divination sensors and targeting, teleportation, or planar travel; casting it on the same spot for 365 days makes it last until dispelled.
spells.upcast: The cube's maximum side length increases by 100 feet for each slot level above 4th.

spells.name: Resilient Sphere
spells.description: A Large or smaller creature or object within 30 feet is enclosed in a weightless, damage-immune sphere for up to 1 minute; an unwilling creature avoids it with a Dexterity save. Nothing passes through the barrier, though a creature inside can breathe and can use an action to roll it up to half its Speed.

spells.name: Secret Chest
spells.description: You touch a chest and its miniature replica, sending the chest and up to 12 cubic feet of nonliving contents to the Ethereal Plane until dispelled. By touching the replica as a Magic action, you recall the chest to an unoccupied ground space within 5 feet, or send it back by touching both.

spells.name: Stone Shape
spells.description: You touch a Medium or smaller stone object, or a stone section no more than 5 feet in any dimension, and reshape it instantly. The new form can include up to two hinges and a latch, but cannot create fine mechanical detail.

spells.name: Stoneskin
spells.description: You touch one willing creature and harden its body for up to 1 hour while you maintain Concentration. The target has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for the duration.

spells.name: Vitriolic Sphere
spells.description: Acid bursts in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered at a point within 150 feet. Each creature in the area makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d4 acid damage on a failure and 5d4 more at the end of its next turn; on a success, it takes half the initial damage only.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.description: You create an opaque wall on a solid surface within 120 feet, up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick, or a ring up to 20 feet in diameter. Creatures in its area make a Dexterity save for 5d8 fire damage, or half on success; one side also deals 5d8 fire to creatures that enter the wall or end within 10 feet of that side.

spells.name: Animate Objects
spells.description: Choose nonmagical, unattended, unfixed objects within 120 feet, up to your spellcasting ability modifier in cost: Medium or smaller counts as one, Large as two, Huge as three. They become Construct allies for up to 1 minute, act after you, follow your Bonus Action mental commands within 500 feet, and Dodge if not commanded.
spells.upcast: Slam damage increases by 1d4 for Medium or smaller objects, 1d6 for Large objects, or 1d12 for Huge objects for each slot level above 5th.

spells.name: Antilife Shell
