spells.description: A 10-foot Emanation surrounds you for up to 1 hour, barring creatures other than Constructs and Undead from passing or reaching through it. Affected creatures can still cast spells or attack through it with ranged or Reach weapons, and the spell ends if your movement forces one through the barrier.

spells.name: Arcane Hand
spells.description: You create a Large magical hand in an unoccupied space within 120 feet for up to 1 minute. When cast and as a Bonus Action, move it 60 feet to punch for 5d8 force damage, push a Huge or smaller creature after a Strength save, grapple one after a Dexterity save and crush for 4d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier bludgeoning damage, or grant you Half Cover.
spells.upcast: Clenched Fist damage increases by 2d8 and Grasping Hand damage by 2d6 for each slot level above 5th.

spells.name: Awaken
spells.description: After 1 hour, you touch a Beast or Plant creature with Intelligence 3 or less, or a natural noncreature plant. The target's Intelligence becomes 10 and it can speak one language you know; a plant becomes a mobile Plant creature, and the awakened target is Charmed by you for 30 days or until you or your allies damage it.

spells.name: Cloudkill
spells.description: You create a 20-foot-radius Sphere of Heavily Obscured poison fog within 120 feet for up to 10 minutes, ended by strong wind. Creatures in it make a Constitution save for 5d8 poison damage, or half on a success, when it appears, moves into them, they enter, or they end there, once per turn; the cloud drifts 10 feet away from you each turn.

spells.name: Commune
spells.description: For 1 minute, you seek answers from a deity or divine servant. Before the spell ends, ask up to three yes-or-no questions; each receives a truthful reply, though unknown or misleading topics may yield unclear or brief answers. Each repeat casting before a Long Rest risks no reply.

spells.name: Commune with Nature
spells.description: You attune to nearby nature and immediately learn three facts you choose about the area: settlements, planar portals, one CR 10+ Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead, a prevalent plant, mineral, or Beast, or bodies of water. The range is 3 miles outdoors or 300 feet in natural underground places, and the spell fails where construction has replaced nature.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 8d8 cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

spells.name: Conjure Elemental
spells.description: You create a Large intangible elemental spirit in an unoccupied space within 60 feet for up to 10 minutes with Concentration, choosing air lightning, earth thunder, fire fire, or water cold. When a creature enters its space or starts within 5 feet while no creature is Restrained by it, you can force a Dexterity save; failure deals 8d8 chosen damage and Restrains the target until the spell ends. At the start of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, taking 4d8 damage on a failure or ending the restraint on a success.

spells.name: Contact Other Plane
spells.description: For 1 minute, you reach an extraplanar mind and first make a DC 15 Intelligence saving throw. On a success, ask up to five questions before the spell ends and receive one-word, unclear, or short-phrase answers as appropriate. On a failure, you take 6d6 psychic damage and are Incapacitated until a Long Rest, unless Greater Restoration ends it.

spells.name: Contagion
spells.description: Make a touch attack by spell effect against one creature; it must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it takes 11d8 necrotic damage and is Poisoned, with Disadvantage on saves using one ability you choose. It repeats the save at each turn's end until three successes end the spell or three failures make it last 7 days. While Poisoned, an effect that would end that condition fails unless the target succeeds on another Constitution save.

spells.name: Creation
spells.description: Within 30 feet, you form a nonliving object no larger than a 5-foot Cube from vegetable or mineral matter whose form and material you have seen. Its duration depends on material: vegetable 24 hours, stone or crystal 12 hours, precious metal 1 hour, gems 10 minutes, and adamantine or mithral 1 minute; mixed objects use the shortest duration, and it cannot serve as another spell's Material component.
spells.upcast: The maximum Cube size grows by 5 feet for each slot level above 5th.

spells.name: Dispel Evil and Good
spells.description: For up to 1 minute with Concentration, you ward yourself against Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead. Creatures of those types have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you, and you can end the spell early to use one of its special functions.

spells.name: Dominate Person
spells.description: One Humanoid you can see within 60 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw, with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failure, it is Charmed for up to 1 minute with Concentration, repeats the save when damaged, and can receive your telepathic commands while on your plane; commanding its Reaction costs yours.
spells.upcast: Concentration can last up to 10 minutes with a 6th-level slot, 1 hour with a 7th-level slot, or 8 hours with an 8th-level or higher slot.

spells.name: Dream
spells.description: For 8 hours, you or a willing creature you touch becomes an Incapacitated, Speed 0 messenger to a known creature on your plane, entering its dreams when it sleeps. The messenger can converse, shape the dream, and end the trance. If made terrifying, it delivers up to ten words; the target then makes a Wisdom save, taking 3d6 psychic damage on waking and gaining no rest benefit on a failure.

spells.name: Flame Strike
spells.description: A column of divine fire roars down on a point within 60 feet. Every creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder rolls a Dexterity save, suffering 5d6 fire damage plus 5d6 radiant damage on a failure, or half as much on a success.

spells.name: Geas
spells.description: Give a command to a creature you can see within 60 feet. If it understands you and fails a Wisdom saving throw, it is Charmed for 30 days; while Charmed, it takes 5d10 psychic damage no more than once per day when it directly defies the command. A suicidal order ends the spell, and Remove Curse, Greater Restoration, or Wish can end it.
spells.upcast: Duration becomes 365 days with a 7th- or 8th-level slot, or lasts until ended by the listed spells with a 9th-level slot.

spells.name: Greater Restoration
spells.description: You touch a creature and immediately remove one chosen effect from it: 1 Exhaustion level, the Charmed or Petrified condition, a curse including cursed-item Attunement, any reduction to an ability score, or any reduction to its Hit Point maximum.

spells.name: Hallow
spells.description: You touch a point and consecrate or desecrate a radius up to 60 feet until dispelled; the spell fails if the area overlaps another Hallow. Choose Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, or Undead to be unable to willingly enter, and possession or Charmed or Frightened effects from them are suppressed there. You also bind one listed extra effect: Courage, Darkness, Daylight, Peaceful Rest, Extradimensional Interference, Fear, Silence, Tongues, or Vulnerability.

spells.name: Hold Monster
spells.description: Choose one creature you can see within 90 feet. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Paralyzed for up to 1 minute with Concentration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns and ending the spell on itself on a success.
spells.upcast: Target one additional creature for each slot level above 5th.

spells.name: Insect Plague
spells.description: A 20-foot-radius Sphere of locusts appears at a point within 300 feet for up to 10 minutes with Concentration. The area is Lightly Obscured and Difficult Terrain. Each creature in it when it appears, that first enters it on a turn, or that ends its turn there makes a Constitution save once per turn, taking 4d10 piercing damage on a failure or half on a success.

spells.name: Legend Lore
spells.description: Name or describe a famous person, place, or object, and you immediately receive an accurate GM-provided summary of important lore about it. Prior knowledge can make the lore more specific, and the information may be figurative or poetic. If the subject is not famous, the spell fails with a sad trombone sound.

spells.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spells.description: Healing energy blooms from a point you can see within 60 feet. Choose up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius Sphere centered there; each regains Hit Points equal to 5d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

spells.name: Mislead
spells.description: For up to 1 hour with Concentration, you become Invisible while an illusory double appears in your space. The invisibility ends as soon as you attack, deal damage, or cast a spell, but the double remains for the duration. As a Magic action, you can move it up to twice your Speed, make it act or speak, and see and hear through it; it is intangible and immune to harm.

spells.name: Modify Memory
spells.description: One creature you can see within 30 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw, with Advantage if you are fighting it. On a failure, it is Charmed and Incapacitated for up to 1 minute with Concentration, but damage or another spell ends this spell without changing memory. While it can hear and understand you, you can erase, clarify, alter, or create its memory of one event from the last 24 hours that lasted no more than 10 minutes; the change takes hold when the spell ends and can be undone by Remove Curse or Greater Restoration.
spells.upcast: The affected event can be up to 7 days old with a 6th-level slot, 30 days with 7th, 365 days with 8th, or any time in the target's past with 9th.

spells.name: Passwall
spells.description: For 1 hour, you open a passage in a wooden, plaster, or stone surface you can see within 30 feet. You choose an opening up to 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and 20 feet deep; it does not weaken the structure. When it closes, anything inside is safely pushed to the nearest unoccupied space by the surface.

spells.name: Planar Binding
spells.description: After a 1-hour casting, a Celestial, Elemental, Fey, or Fiend that stayed within 60 feet must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it serves you for 24 hours and any summoning or creation spell holding it extends to match this duration. It follows your commands as well as it can, though a Hostile creature twists them toward its own goals.
spells.upcast: Duration becomes 10 days with a 6th-level slot, 30 days with 7th, 180 days with 8th, or 366 days with 9th.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.description: You touch a dead creature that has been dead no longer than 10 days and was not Undead, returning it to life with 1 Hit Point. The spell neutralizes poisons present at death and closes mortal wounds, but missing vital body parts make it fail. The target takes a -4 penalty to D20 Tests, reduced by 1 after each Long Rest.

spells.name: Reincarnate
spells.description: You touch a dead Humanoid or part of one that has been dead no longer than 10 days, creating a new body and calling its soul back. Roll 1d10 to determine the new species, or the GM chooses another playable species; the creature keeps its former capabilities and memories but replaces its old species traits with the new ones.

spells.name: Scrying
spells.description: For up to 10 minutes with Concentration, choose a creature on your plane; it makes a Wisdom save modified by your knowledge and physical connection. On a failure, an Invisible intangible sensor appears within 10 feet of it, moves with it, and lets you see and hear there; a successful save blocks this spell against it for 24 hours. Instead, you can target a seen location, placing the sensor there without a save.

spells.name: Seeming
spells.description: For 8 hours, you disguise any creatures you choose that you can see within 30 feet; unwilling targets avoid the spell with a Charisma saving throw. You can change bodies and equipment, including height by 1 foot and apparent weight, but the limb arrangement must match. Physical inspection reveals false details, and a Study action can uncover the illusion with an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.

spells.name: Summon Dragon
spells.description: You summon a Dragon spirit in an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet for up to 1 hour with Concentration. It uses the Draconic Spirit stat block, is allied with you and your allies, shares your Initiative count, acts immediately after you, and follows your verbal commands; without commands it Dodges and moves away from danger. It vanishes at 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends.
spells.upcast: Use the slot level as the spell's level in the Draconic Spirit stat block.

spells.name: Telekinesis
spells.description: For up to 10 minutes with Concentration, you can use the spell when cast and as a Magic action to affect one visible creature or object within 60 feet. A Huge or smaller creature, or a worn or carried object, requires a Strength saving throw; on a failure you move it up to 30 feet, and a creature is Restrained until the end of your next turn. Unattended Huge or smaller objects move automatically, and you can apply fine control.

spells.name: Telepathic Bond
spells.description: For 1 hour, you link up to eight willing creatures within 30 feet that can communicate in at least one language. Each target can speak telepathically with all the others regardless of shared language and across any distance, but the bond does not reach across planes.

spells.name: Teleportation Circle
spells.description: Within 10 feet, you inscribe a 5-foot-radius circle that opens a portal until the end of your next turn to a permanent teleportation circle on your plane whose sigil sequence you know. Any creature entering the portal appears within 5 feet of the destination or the nearest unoccupied space. You learn two Material Plane sequences when you gain the spell, can memorize a new one after 1 minute of study, and can make a circle permanent by casting here daily for 365 days.

spells.name: Tree Stride
spells.description: For up to 1 minute with Concentration, you can spend 5 feet of movement to enter a living tree at least your size and instantly sense same-kind trees within 500 feet. As part of that movement, you can step out of the entered tree or a sensed tree, appearing within 5 feet of it and spending another 5 feet of movement. You can use this transport once per turn and must finish each turn outside a tree.

spells.name: Wall of Force
spells.description: An invisible wall of force springs into existence at a point you choose within range. The wall appears in any orientation you choose, as a horizontal or vertical barrier or at an angle. It can be free floating or resting on a solid surface. You can form it into a hemispherical dome or a sphere. The wall is immune to all damage and can't be dispelled.

spells.name: Wall of Stone
spells.description: You raise a nonmagical stone barrier within 120 feet, using ten connected 10-foot panels 6 inches thick or 10-by-20-foot panels 3 inches thick, all supported by existing stone. Creatures enclosed by it may make a Dexterity save to use their Reaction to move out. Each panel has AC 15 and 30 HP per inch, and 10 minutes of concentration makes it permanent.

spells.name: Blade Barrier
spells.description: You form a whirling force-blade wall within 90 feet, either up to 100 feet long, 20 feet high, and 5 feet thick or a ring up to 60 feet across. It grants Three-Quarters Cover and is Difficult Terrain. A creature in it, entering it, or ending its turn there makes a Dexterity save, taking 6d10 force damage on a failure or half on a success, once per turn.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target of your choice that you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from that target to as many as three other targets, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first target. A target can be a creature or an object and can be targeted by only one bolt. Each target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a target takes 10d8 lightning damage, or half as much on a successful save. One additional bolt leaps for each slot level above 6th.

spells.name: Circle of Death
spells.description: Negative energy bursts in a 60-foot-radius sphere from a point within 150 feet. Each creature there rolls a Constitution save, suffering 8d8 necrotic damage on a failure or half that on a success.

spells.name: Conjure Fey
spells.description: You call a Medium Fey spirit into an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet for up to 10 minutes. When it appears, and as a Bonus Action on later turns after teleporting it up to 30 feet, you make a melee spell attack from it against a creature within 5 feet. On a hit, the target takes 3d12 + your spellcasting ability modifier psychic damage and is Frightened of you and the spirit until your next turn starts.

spells.name: Contingency
spells.description: You cast a 5th-level or lower spell that takes an action and can target you, delaying its effect for up to 10 days until a trigger you define occurs. The stored spell then affects only you immediately after that trigger and Contingency ends. You can have only one Contingency active, and it ends if its material component leaves your person.

spells.name: Create Undead
spells.description: At night, you animate up to three Medium or Small Humanoid corpses within 10 feet as Ghouls under your control for 24 hours. As a Bonus Action, you can command any of them within 120 feet, giving the same order to multiple undead if desired; without orders, they Dodge and avoid danger. Recasting before control ends reasserts command over up to three such undead.
spells.upcast: A 7th-level slot affects four Ghouls; an 8th-level slot affects five Ghouls or two Ghasts or Wights; a 9th-level slot affects six Ghouls, three Ghasts or Wights, or two Mummies.

spells.name: Disintegrate
spells.description: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger to a target you can see within range. The target can be a creature, an object, or a magical force. A creature targeted by this spell must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 10d6 + 40 force damage. If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is disintegrated. Damage increases by 3d6 for each slot level above 6th.

spells.name: Eyebite
spells.description: For up to 1 minute, choose a creature you can see within 60 feet; it makes a Wisdom save or suffers one effect: Unconscious until damaged or awakened, Frightened and forced to Dash away until it reaches safety beyond 60 feet, or Poisoned. On later turns, you can use a Magic action to target another creature that has not succeeded against this casting.

spells.name: Find the Path
spells.description: For up to 1 day, you sense the most direct physical route to a familiar fixed location on your current plane. While the destination remains valid, you know its direction and distance and which option is the most direct whenever the route branches.

spells.name: Flesh to Stone
spells.description: One creature you can see within 60 feet makes a Constitution saving throw; Constructs succeed automatically. On a failure, it is Restrained and repeats the save at the end of each turn until it reaches three successes, ending the spell, or three failures, becoming Petrified for the duration. If concentration lasts the full minute, the Petrified condition remains until Greater Restoration or similar magic ends it.

spells.name: Forbiddance
spells.description: You ward up to 40,000 square feet of floor space, 30 feet high, for 1 day, blocking teleportation, portals, and planar travel into the area. Choose one or more of Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead; chosen creatures take 5d10 necrotic damage when they first enter on a turn or end there unless they speak your password. Daily casting for 30 days makes the ward last until dispelled.

spells.name: Freezing Sphere
spells.description: A cold globe detonates at a point within 300 feet in a 60-foot-radius sphere. Each creature there makes a Constitution save, taking 10d6 cold damage on a failure or half on a success. Water it hits freezes 6 inches deep in a 30-foot square for 1 minute, Restrained surface swimmers until they use an action and beat your spell save DC with Strength (Athletics); you may also hold the globe for up to 1 minute before it bursts.

spells.name: Globe of Invulnerability
spells.description: An immobile 10-foot Emanation surrounds you for up to 1 minute. Spells of level 5 or lower cast from outside the barrier have no effect on creatures or objects inside it, and their areas exclude the protected space.
spells.upcast: The globe blocks spells one level higher for each slot level above 6th.

spells.name: Guards and Wards
spells.description: You protect up to 2,500 square feet of floor space, up to 20 feet tall, for 24 hours, with chosen creatures or password speakers unaffected. Corridors fill with heavy fog and misleading turns, doors are magically locked and up to ten disguised, stairs fill with regrowing webs, and you add one listed magical effect such as lights, mouths, clouds, wind, or a suggestion. Daily casting for 365 days makes it last until all effects are dispelled.

spells.name: Harm
spells.description: A creature you can see within 60 feet makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failure it suffers 14d6 necrotic damage and its Hit Point maximum drops by that same amount; on a success it takes only half and its maximum is unchanged. This can't lower a target's Hit Point maximum below 1.

spells.name: Heal
spells.description: Choose a creature you can see within 60 feet and flood it with restorative magic. The target regains 70 Hit Points, and the spell also ends the Blinded, Deafened, and Poisoned conditions on it.
spells.upcast: The healing increases by 10 for each slot level above 6th.

spells.name: Heroes' Feast
spells.description: You conjure a feast in an unoccupied 10-foot Cube next to you, and up to twelve creatures can spend 1 hour eating it. For the next 24 hours, each participant has resistance to poison damage, immunity to the Frightened and Poisoned conditions, and a Hit Point maximum increase of 2d10 while gaining the same number of Hit Points.

spells.name: Instant Summons
spells.description: You bind a sapphire to an object you touch that weighs 10 pounds or less and is no more than 6 feet in its longest dimension, marking the object invisibly until dispelled. Later, you can use a Magic action to speak the object's name and crush the sapphire, bringing the object to your hand across any distance or plane. If another creature holds or carries it, you instead learn that creature's identity and location.

spells.name: Irresistible Dance
spells.description: One creature you can see within 30 feet makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is Charmed for up to 1 minute, must spend all movement dancing in place, has disadvantage on Dexterity saves and attacks, and grants advantage to attacks against it; it can use an action each turn to repeat the save and end the spell. On a success, it dances only until the end of its next turn.

spells.name: Magic Jar
spells.description: Your soul enters the spell's container while your body becomes catatonic; from there, you can return to your body or attempt to possess a Humanoid you can see within 100 feet. The target makes a Charisma save; on a failure, you control its body while its soul is trapped and Incapacitated in the container. The spell describes when distance, death, or a destroyed container kills or returns a separated soul.

spells.name: Mass Suggestion
spells.description: You give a reasonable course of activity, no more than 25 words, to up to twelve creatures you can see within 60 feet that can hear and understand you. Each target makes a Wisdom save; on a failure, it is Charmed for 24 hours or until you or your allies damage it, and it follows the suggestion until the task is complete or the spell ends.
spells.upcast: The duration becomes 10 days with a 7th-level slot, 30 days with an 8th-level slot, or 366 days with a 9th-level slot.

spells.name: Move Earth
spells.description: For up to 2 hours, choose dirt, sand, or clay terrain within 120 feet in an area no larger than 40 feet on a side and reshape it over 10 minutes. You can raise, lower, trench, wall, flatten, or form pillars, with changes limited to half the area's largest dimension. Every 10 minutes, you may affect a new area within range; natural stone, stone construction, and plant growth are not directly shaped.

spells.name: Planar Ally
spells.description: You ask a known cosmic power to send a loyal Celestial, Elemental, or Fiend into an unoccupied space within 60 feet. The creature is not compelled to serve, so you must bargain for a task it accepts, often paying by the minute, hour, or day based on risk and alignment. If no agreement is reached, it returns home; after the service ends, it departs and reports back if possible.

spells.name: Programmed Illusion
spells.description: You set an unseen illusion within 120 feet, no larger than a 30-foot Cube, to trigger from sights or sounds within 30 feet. When triggered, it performs your chosen sounds and motions for up to 5 minutes, then lies dormant for 10 minutes. Physical contact exposes it, and a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC lets a creature see through it and hear hollow sounds.

spells.name: Sunbeam
spells.description: You emit a 5-foot-wide, 60-foot-long Line of sunlight. Each creature in the Line makes a Constitution save, taking 6d8 radiant damage and becoming Blinded until your next turn starts on a failure, or taking half damage only on a success. Until the spell ends, you can use a Magic action to create the Line again, and a sunlit mote above you sheds bright light for 30 feet and dim light for 30 more.

spells.name: Transport via Plants
spells.description: You link a Large or larger inanimate plant within 10 feet to another plant on the same plane that you have previously seen or touched. For 1 minute, any creature can spend 5 feet of movement to enter the nearby plant and emerge from the destination plant.

spells.name: True Seeing
spells.description: You touch a willing creature and sharpen its supernatural sight for 1 hour. For the duration, the target has Truesight with a range of 120 feet.

spells.name: Wall of Ice
spells.description: You create a 1-foot-thick ice wall on a solid surface within 120 feet: a 10-foot-radius dome or globe, or ten 10-foot-square panels. A crossed creature is pushed aside and makes a Dexterity save, taking 10d6 cold damage on a failure or half on a success. Each 10-foot section has AC 12, 30 HP, immunity to cold, poison, and psychic, and fire vulnerability; a broken section leaves frigid air that deals 5d6 cold damage on a Constitution save.

spells.name: Wall of Thorns
spells.description: You grow a thorny wall on a solid surface within 120 feet, either up to 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick or a 20-foot-diameter ring up to 20 feet high and 5 feet thick, blocking line of sight. Creatures in the area when it appears make a Dexterity save, taking 7d8 piercing damage on a failure or half on a success. Moving through costs 4 feet per foot, and a creature entering or ending there once per turn saves again for 7d8 slashing damage or half.

spells.name: Wind Walk
spells.description: You and up to ten willing creatures within 30 feet become cloudlike for 8 hours. In this form, a target has a 300-foot Fly Speed, can hover, is immune to Prone, resists bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage, and can only Dash or use a Magic action to begin a 1-minute change back that leaves it Stunned. Targets can return to cloud form the same way, and if the spell ends midair they descend safely for up to 1 minute before falling any remaining distance.

spells.name: Word of Recall
spells.description: You and up to five willing creatures within 5 feet instantly teleport to a sanctuary you previously designated by casting this spell there. Each arriving creature appears in the nearest unoccupied space to the designated spot; if you have no prepared sanctuary, the spell does nothing.

spells.name: Arcane Sword
spells.description: A spectral blade appears at a point within 90 feet and lasts while you concentrate, up to 1 minute. When it appears, and later as a Bonus Action after moving it up to 30 feet to a space you can see, make a melee spell attack against a target within 5 feet of it; on a hit, the target takes 4d12 + your spellcasting ability modifier force damage.

spells.name: Conjure Celestial
spells.description: A 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high bright cylinder appears within 90 feet for concentration, up to 10 minutes. Once per turn, when a creature you can see is in it, enters it, ends there, or is reached by its 30-foot move with you, choose: heal it for 4d12 + your spellcasting ability modifier, or force a Dexterity save for 6d12 radiant damage, half on success. Healing and damage increase by 1d12 for each slot level above 7th.
spells.upcast: Healing and damage each increase by 1d12 per slot level above 7th.

spells.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
spells.description: A glowing bead forms at a point within 150 feet for concentration, up to 1 minute. When the spell ends or the bead is disturbed, it bursts in a 20-foot-radius sphere; each creature makes a Dexterity save, taking 12d6 fire damage on a failure or half on a success. The damage increases by 1d6 at the end of each of your turns before it explodes.

spells.name: Divine Word
spells.description: Each creature you choose within 30 feet makes a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, a target with 50 hit points or fewer is affected by its current hit points: 0-20 dies, 21-30 is Blinded, Deafened, and Stunned for 1 hour, 31-40 is Blinded and Deafened for 10 minutes, and 41-50 is Deafened for 1 minute. A failing Celestial, Elemental, Fey, or Fiend is returned to its home plane and barred from this plane for 24 hours except by Wish.

spells.name: Etherealness
spells.description: You enter the Border Ethereal for 8 hours, moving there while perceiving your original plane out to 60 feet and interacting only with Ethereal creatures, objects, and effects. When the spell ends, you return to the corresponding space; if it is occupied, you shift to the nearest open space and take force damage equal to twice the feet moved. You can include up to three willing creatures within 10 feet of you for each slot level above 7th.
spells.upcast: Includes up to three willing creatures within 10 feet per slot level above 7th.

spells.name: Finger of Death
spells.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature that you can see within range, causing it searing pain. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. It takes 7d8 + 30 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A humanoid killed by this spell rises at the start of your next turn as a zombie under your control.

spells.name: Fire Storm
spells.description: Flames fill up to ten contiguous 10-foot cubes you arrange within 150 feet. Creatures caught in the area roll a Dexterity save, suffering 7d10 fire damage on a failure or half that on a success. Unattended flammable objects there catch fire.

spells.name: Forcecage
spells.description: An invisible force prison appears within 100 feet for concentration, up to 1 hour, as either a barred cage up to 20 feet on a side or a solid box up to 10 feet on a side. Creatures fully inside are trapped, while others are pushed out; escape by teleportation or planar travel requires a Charisma save, and failure wastes the effect. It extends into the Ethereal Plane and cannot be dispelled by Dispel Magic.

spells.name: Magnificent Mansion
spells.description: A 5-foot-wide, 10-foot-tall door appears within 300 feet for 24 hours, leading to a furnished extradimensional dwelling of up to fifty contiguous 10-foot cubes. You choose who may enter, open or close the door while within 30 feet, and receive food for up to 100 people plus 100 harmless servants. When the spell ends, anything inside is expelled near the entrance.

spells.name: Mirage Arcane
spells.description: You reshape the sensory appearance and feel of terrain in an area up to 1 mile square that you can see, lasting 10 days. The illusion can alter or add structures and make terrain hinder or ease movement, but it does not hide or create creatures. Removed pieces vanish, and Truesight reveals the real terrain while the illusion remains physically interactive.

spells.name: Plane Shift
spells.description: You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. You can specify a target destination or state a general description and you appear in or near that destination. Alternatively, if you know the sigil sequence of a teleportation circle on another plane, this spell can take you to that circle.

spells.name: Prismatic Spray
spells.description: Rays fill a 60-foot cone; each creature makes a Dexterity save and rolls 1d8. Results 1-5 deal 12d6 fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold damage, half on success; 6 causes Restrained on a failed save, then Constitution saves each turn until three successes end it or three failures cause Petrified; 7 causes Blinded on a failed save, then a Wisdom save next turn to avoid planar banishment; 8 rolls two rays.

spells.name: Project Image
spells.description: You create an intangible duplicate of yourself at a place you have seen within 500 miles for concentration, up to 1 day. You can see and hear through it, and as a Magic action move it up to 60 feet and make it speak or gesture. Damage ends the spell, physical contact reveals the illusion, and a Study action with an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC exposes it.

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.description: A creature you touch regains 4d8 + 15 Hit Points. For 1 hour it recovers 1 more Hit Point at the start of each of its turns, and lost body parts regrow after 2 minutes.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: You touch a creature dead no longer than a century that did not die of old age and was not Undead, returning it to life with all hit points, neutralizing poisons present at death, closing mortal wounds, and restoring missing body parts. The return gives the target a -4 penalty to D20 Tests, reduced by 1 after each Long Rest; if it was dead 365 days or more, you cannot cast spells and have Disadvantage on D20 Tests until your Long Rest.

spells.name: Reverse Gravity
spells.description: Gravity reverses in a 50-foot-radius, 100-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within 100 feet for concentration, up to 1 minute. Unanchored creatures and objects fall upward to the top; a creature can avoid the fall with a Dexterity save by grabbing a fixed object it can reach. Collisions deal normal falling effects, and affected targets fall back down when the spell ends.

spells.name: Sequester
spells.description: You touch a willing creature or object, making it Invisible and shielding it from Divination spells, magical detection, and magical remote viewing until dispelled. A creature target also becomes Unconscious in suspended animation, does not age, and needs no food, water, or air. The spell can end on a condition you set within 1 mile, or if the target takes damage.

spells.name: Simulacrum
spells.description: You spend 1 hour with a Beast or Humanoid within 10 feet, then touch it and snow or ice to create a duplicate until dispelled or 0 hit points. It is a Construct using the original's statistics, with half maximum hit points, no ability to cast this spell, no rests or leveling, and it obeys you on your turn. Repair it during a Long Rest for 100 GP per hit point; casting again destroys your prior simulacrum.

spells.name: Symbol
spells.description: A glyph up to 10 feet across lasts until dispelled or triggered, then casts Dim Light in a 60-foot-radius sphere for 10 minutes, affecting each creature once per turn. Choose Death (Constitution save, 10d10 necrotic, half on success), Discord (Wisdom, arguing and Disadvantage 1 minute), Fear (Wisdom, Frightened 1 minute), Pain (Constitution, Incapacitated 1 minute), Sleep (Wisdom, Unconscious 10 minutes), or Stunning (Wisdom, Stunned 1 minute).

spells.name: Teleport
spells.description: You instantly transport yourself and up to eight willing creatures you can see within 10 feet, or one visible unattended Large or smaller object within 10 feet, to a known destination on the same plane. The GM rolls 1d100 using your familiarity to determine on target, off target by 2d12 miles, similar area, or mishap; a mishap deals 3d10 force damage to each traveler or the object and repeats the roll.

spells.name: Animal Shapes
spells.description: Willing creatures you can see within 30 feet become Large or smaller Beasts of challenge rating 4 or lower for 24 hours. Each keeps hit points, Hit Point Dice, type, alignment, communication, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma; equipment melds, spellcasting is impossible, and first form grants Temporary Hit Points equal to that form's hit points. A target can end the form as a Bonus Action, and you can reshape targets with a Magic action.

spells.name: Antimagic Field
spells.description: For concentration up to 1 hour, a 10-foot Emanation around you suppresses magic. Spells cannot be cast, Magic actions and magical effects cannot be created, magic cannot target or affect anything inside, magic item properties stop working, magical areas do not extend into it, teleportation and planar travel fail there, portals close temporarily, and ongoing spells are suppressed while their durations continue.

spells.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
spells.description: For 10 days, one Huge or smaller creature or object within 60 feet affects a creature kind you name. When one comes within 120 feet, it makes a Wisdom save; on a failure, antipathy makes it Frightened and forces movement away, while sympathy makes it Charmed and forces movement closer, preventing willing movement away within 5 feet. It saves again after ending a turn over 120 feet away, or if the sympathy target damages it.

spells.name: Befuddlement
spells.description: One creature you can see within 150 feet makes an Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 10d12 psychic damage and cannot cast spells or take the Magic action; it repeats the save every 30 days, ending the effect on a success, and Greater Restoration, Heal, or Wish can also end it. On a successful save, it takes half damage only.

spells.name: Clone
spells.description: You touch a creature or at least 1 cubic inch of its flesh, causing an inert duplicate to grow in the spell's vessel over 120 days. Once mature, the clone remains indefinitely while undisturbed; if the original dies and its soul is free and willing, the soul enters the clone, which has the same body, personality, memories, and abilities but no equipment. The original remains become inert and cannot be revived.

spells.name: Control Weather
spells.description: Outdoors, you control weather within 5 miles of you for concentration, up to 8 hours; the spell ends if you go indoors. You can shift precipitation, temperature, and wind one stage up or down, and wind direction as well. Each change takes 1d4 x 10 minutes to take effect, after which you can alter the weather again; normal conditions return gradually when the spell ends.

spells.name: Demiplane
spells.description: A shadowy Medium door appears on a flat solid surface you can see within 60 feet for 1 hour. It opens into an empty 30-foot-cube demiplane of wood or stone, either newly created, one you made before, or one whose nature and contents you know. When the door vanishes, objects remain inside, and creatures may stay or be shunted out Prone into the nearest unoccupied spaces.

spells.name: Dominate Monster
spells.description: One creature you can see within 60 feet makes a Wisdom save, with Advantage if you or allies fight it. On failure, it is Charmed for concentration up to 1 hour; on the same plane, you command it telepathically without an action, and you can spend your Reaction to make it take a Reaction. It repeats the save when damaged, ending the spell on success. With a 9th-level slot, concentration can last up to 8 hours.
spells.upcast: A 9th-level slot extends concentration to up to 8 hours.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.description: A ground point within 500 feet shakes a 100-foot-radius circle for concentration up to 1 minute, making Difficult Terrain. On casting and each turn's end, grounded creatures there make a Dexterity save or fall Prone and lose Concentration. You can open 1d6 fissures; structures take 50 bludgeoning damage each time, and collapse forces nearby creatures to save or take 12d6 bludgeoning damage, fall Prone, and be buried, half damage only on success.

spells.name: Glibness
spells.description: For 1 hour, when you make a Charisma check, you can treat the d20 roll as a 15. In addition, magic that would reveal whether you are telling the truth reports that you are truthful, regardless of what you say.

spells.name: Holy Aura
spells.description: For concentration up to 1 minute, you emit a 30-foot Emanation. Creatures you choose in the aura have Advantage on all saving throws, and attacks against them by other creatures have Disadvantage. When a Fiend or Undead hits an affected creature with a melee attack, the attacker must succeed on a Constitution save or be Blinded until the end of its next turn.

spells.name: Incendiary Cloud
spells.description: A Heavily Obscured 20-foot-radius sphere appears within 150 feet for concentration, up to 1 minute, unless strong wind disperses it. When it appears, moves onto a creature, or a creature enters or ends there, that creature makes a Dexterity save, taking 10d8 fire damage on a failure or half on a success, once per turn. At each of your turns, it moves 10 feet away from you in a direction you choose.

spells.name: Maze
spells.description: Choose a creature you can see within 60 feet; for concentration up to 10 minutes, it is banished to a maze-like demiplane. The target can use the Study action to make a DC 20 Intelligence (Investigation) check, escaping and ending the spell on a success. When it ends, it returns to its former space or nearest unoccupied space.

spells.name: Mind Blank
spells.description: For 24 hours, one willing creature you touch has immunity to psychic damage and the Charmed condition. It can't have emotions, alignment, thoughts, or location magically sensed, and spells can't gather information about it, observe it remotely, or control its mind.

spells.name: Power Word Stun
spells.description: You speak a word of power that can overwhelm the mind of one creature you can see within range. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is stunned. Otherwise, the spell has no effect. The stunned target must make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. On a successful save, this stunning effect ends.

spells.name: Sunburst
spells.description: Sunlight erupts in a 60-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within 150 feet. Each creature there makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 12d6 radiant damage and becoming Blinded for 1 minute on a failure, or half damage only on a success. A Blinded target repeats the save at each turn's end, and the burst dispels spell-created Darkness in the area.

spells.name: Tsunami
spells.description: A water wall up to 300 feet long, 300 feet high, and 50 feet thick appears within 1 mile for concentration up to 6 rounds. Creatures in it make a Strength save, taking 6d10 bludgeoning damage on a failure or half on a success. On later turns it moves 50 feet away; Huge or smaller creatures it catches save or take 5d10 bludgeoning damage, with height and later damage dropping by 50 feet and 1d10 each round.

spells.name: Astral Projection
spells.description: You and up to eight willing creatures within 10 feet project astral forms onto the Astral Plane until dispelled, leaving Unconscious bodies in suspended animation that don't age or need food or air. The astral form has the target's statistics and possessions, is linked by a silver cord whose severing kills both forms, and returns to the body when it leaves the Astral Plane, drops to 0 hit points, or you dismiss the spell.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.description: For 8 hours, one willing creature you touch glimpses moments before they happen. The target has Advantage on D20 Tests, and attack rolls against it have Disadvantage; the spell ends early if you cast it again.

spells.name: Gate
spells.description: You open a 5- to 20-foot-diameter portal in an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet, linking to a precise location on another plane for concentration up to 1 minute. Travel works only through the portal's front, and planar rulers can block it. If you name a specific creature on another plane, the portal opens beside it and draws it to your nearest unoccupied space without giving you control over it.

spells.name: Imprisonment
spells.description: A creature you can see within 30 feet makes a Wisdom save; on success it is unaffected and immune for 24 hours, and on failure it is imprisoned until dispelled. It needn't breathe, eat, or drink, doesn't age, can't be found by divination or teleport, and suffers one chosen prison: sealed burial, Restrained chains, warded demiplane, 1-inch gem, or Unconscious slumber. You set an ending trigger; Dispel Magic must use a 9th-level slot.

spells.name: Mass Heal
spells.description: You distribute up to 700 hit points of healing among any number of creatures you can see within 60 feet, restoring each chosen amount instantly. Any creature healed this way also loses the Blinded, Deafened, and Poisoned conditions.

spells.name: Meteor Swarm
spells.description: Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points you can see within range. Each creature in a 40-foot-radius sphere centered on each point you choose must make a Dexterity saving throw. The sphere spreads around corners. A creature takes 20d6 fire damage and 20d6 bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

spells.name: Power Word Heal
spells.description: One creature you can see within 60 feet regains all its hit points instantly. If it has the Charmed, Frightened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Stunned condition, that condition ends; if it is Prone, it can use its Reaction to stand.

spells.name: Power Word Kill
spells.description: Choose one creature you can see within 60 feet. If it has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies instantly; otherwise, it takes 12d12 psychic damage. The instantaneous effect allows no saving throw and applies to that single target only.

spells.name: Prismatic Wall
spells.description: Within 60 feet, you create a 10-minute wall up to 90 feet long, 30 feet high, and 1 inch thick, or a globe up to 30 feet across. Others that see it within 20 feet make a Constitution save or are Blinded for 1 minute. Crossing seven layers requires Dexterity saves against 12d6 fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold damage, or risks indigo Restrained then Petrified and violet Blinded then planar banishment effects; layers block attacks or spells.

spells.name: Shapechange
spells.description: For concentration up to 1 hour, you assume a creature form you have seen, not a Construct or Undead, with CR no higher than your level or CR. You gain temporary hit points equal to the first form's hit points, use the form's stat block, and retain your type, alignment, personality, Int/Wis/Cha, hit points, Hit Dice, proficiencies, communication, and Spellcasting; as a Magic action you can change again, and gear drops or fits the form.

spells.name: Storm of Vengeance
spells.description: A 300-foot-radius storm cloud appears centered within 1 mile for concentration up to 1 minute. Creatures under it when it forms make a Constitution save or take 2d6 thunder damage and become Deafened for the duration. Later turns bring 4d6 acid rain, six Dexterity-save lightning bolts for 10d6 lightning, 2d6 bludgeoning hail, then 1d6 cold each turn plus Difficult Terrain, Heavy Obscurement, no ranged weapon attacks, and strong wind.

spells.name: Time Stop
spells.description: You halt time for others and take 1d4 + 1 turns in a row, moving and acting normally. The instantaneous spell ends early if an action or effect you create affects another creature or an object worn or carried by another creature, or if you move more than 1,000 feet from where you cast it.

spells.name: True Polymorph
spells.description: Choose a creature or nonmagical, unworn object you can see within 30 feet; an unwilling creature avoids the effect with a Wisdom save. For concentration up to 1 hour, you turn a creature into a creature of CR no higher than its CR or level, a creature into an object no larger than it, or an object into a CR 9 or lower creature no larger than the object; full-duration concentration makes the change last until dispelled.

spells.name: True Resurrection
spells.description: You touch a creature dead no more than 200 years, unless it died of old age, and return it instantly with all hit points. Wounds close, poison is neutralized, magical contagions and curses end, missing organs and limbs are restored, and an Undead target returns to its non-Undead form. If no body remains, speak its name to create one in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of you.

spells.name: Weird
spells.description: Choose creatures in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within 120 feet for concentration up to 1 minute. Each target makes a Wisdom saving throw, taking 10d10 psychic damage and becoming Frightened for the duration on a failure, or half damage only on a success. A Frightened target repeats the save at the end of each turn, taking 5d10 psychic damage on a failure or ending the spell on itself on a success.

spells.name: Wish
spells.description: Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter reality itself. The most basic use of this spell is to duplicate any other spell of 8th level or lower without needing components. The spell simply takes effect. Alternatively, you can create effects such as granting immunity, undoing harm, or other powerful outcomes at the DM's discretion. The stress of casting this spell to produce effects beyond duplicating a spell may prevent you from ever casting Wish again.
